differential_reasoning: AL amyloidosis is not the same as wild-type ATTR cardiac amyloidosis, and none of the other listed differentials are semantically equivalent to AL amyloidosis.

harm_reproductions.reasoning: The LLM did not recommend repeating transthoracic echocardiography in 1 month.
The LLM did not recommend whole-body PET-CT imaging.
The LLM did not recommend empiric high-dose steroids.
